programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With onshore wind fighting the 1.7m swell, today's Ribeira session promises a delightful churn of frustration.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
Supertubos will offer a few 1.7m ramps with texture; hopefully the inside isn't a washing machine.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.7m swell and onshore wind suggests a day of battling white water and questionable decisions.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.7m and onshore wind, today's session will likely involve more paddling than riding, and possibly some involuntary face-washing.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.7m and onshore wind, Cantinho will be a closeout party, unless you enjoy bouncing off the sand.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.7m swell and crosswind suggests a session battling closeouts and chop; chiropractor appointment pending.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 1.7m waves will either be rippable or a complete waste of wax, depending on the mood.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.6m swell and onshore wind sounds like a guaranteed workout, mostly fetching your board.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 1.5m Supertubos might offer a ride or two before the wind turns them to soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With onshore wind and a 1.5m swell, today promises a workout more than a barrel.

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a cross wind on the 1.5m swell, it'll be a choppy paddle out and a bumpy ride back, assuming you get one.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
